zh.Tunstall, Lancashire, England: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾彤絲朵
zh.Thurland, Lancashire, England: 英國藍卡爾瑟藍德 卡素
zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine Tunstall於大約1395年出生在英國藍卡爾彤絲朵時，她的父親Sir Thomas Tunstall36歲，母親Isabel Harington28歲。她於1412年4月28日與Sir John Pennington I在英國藍卡爾瑟藍德 卡素結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.Tunstall, Lancashire, England: 英国英格兰藍卡爾彤絲朵
zh-hans.Thurland, Lancashire, England: 英国藍卡爾瑟藍德 卡素
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katherine Tunstall于大约1395年出生在英国藍卡爾彤絲朵时，她的父亲Sir Thomas Tunstall36岁，母亲Isabel Harington28岁。她于1412年4月28日与Sir John Pennington I在英国藍卡爾瑟藍德 卡素结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Tunstall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly Lancashire): habitational name from any of various places called with Old English tūn-stall ‘site of a farm, farmstead’, notably Tunstall (Lancashire) and one or more of many Staffordshire places (Tunstall near Stoke on Trent, Tunstall near Adbaston, and four places called Dunstall), but also Tunstall Farm in Mountfield (Sussex) and possibly also Tunstall (Durham, Kent, Norfolk, Shropshire, Suffolk, east and North Yorkshire), and Dunstall (Lincolnshire).

variants.name: Tunstill
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): variant of   Tunstall  .

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of   Katherine  , also occasionally used in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine Tunstall was born about 1395, in Tunstall, Lancashire, England, her father, Sir Thomas Tunstall, was 36 and her mother, Isabel Harington, was 28. She married Sir John Pennington I on 28 April 1412, in Thurland Castle, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katherine Tunstall est née environ 1395, à Tunstall, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Tunstall, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Isabel Harington, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Pennington I le 28 avril 1412, à Thurland Castle, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Katherine Tunstall um 1395 in Tunstall, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas Tunstall 36 und ihre Mutter Isabel Harington 28. Sie hat am 28. April 1412 in Thurland Castle, Lancashire, England Sir John Pennington I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Tunstall è nata il circa 1395 nel Tunstall, Lancashire, England, sua padre, Sir Thomas Tunstall, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Isabel Harington, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Pennington I il 28 aprile 1412, nel Thurland Castle, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie.

ja.Muncaster, Cumberland, England: イギリスクウンバーランドムンカスター

ja.Thurland, Lancashire, England: イギリスランカシュアイアスウルランド カストル
ja.lifeSummary: Katherine Tunstallが約1395年にイギリスランカシュアイアトゥンスタルで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Tunstallは36歳，母Isabel Haringtonは28歳であった。1412年4月28日にイギリスランカシュアイアスウルランド カストルでSir John Pennington Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine Tunstall(이)가 대략 1395년 영국 랭카실르 툰스탤에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas Tunstall(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel Harington(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1412년 4월 28일 영국 랭카실르 스를랜드 카스틀에서 Sir John Pennington I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다.

mn.Tunstall, Lancashire, England: Tunstall, Lancashire, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Tunstall nasceu aproximadamente 1395, em Tunstall, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Tunstall, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Harington, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Pennington I em 28 de abril de 1412, em Thurland Castle, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine Tunstall родилась около 1395 г. в местности тунсталл, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas Tunstall было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Harington, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Pennington I 28 апреля 1412 г. в местности турланд кастл, ланкашир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Katherine Tunstall nació aproximadamente 1395, en Tunstall, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Tunstall, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Isabel Harington, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Sir John Pennington I el 28 de abril de 1412, en Thurland Castle, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas.
